calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-029: COMMITTED_MODE_ON vs COMMITTED_MODE_ABLATED x stable/volatile x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0085: matched-seed discriminative pair. COMMITTED_MODE_ON (BG beta gate active, agent trained to committed state) vs COMMITTED_MODE_ABLATED (gate disabled: running_var forced > commit_threshold each step) x stable (drift=0.0) vs volatile (drift=0.4, interval=3). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions x 2 envs = 8 cells. 6 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_gap_stable>=0.0001 (both seeds), C2 gap_volatile<gap_stable (both seeds), C3 gap_ratio<=0.90 (both seeds), C4 gate active in ON condition, C5 ablation complete, C6 no fatal errors. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps. Strengthens EXQ-063 PASS (5/5, conf=0.774) with canonical matched seeds.

items.title: MECH-104: SURPRISE_GATE_ON vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (volatility gate discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0086: matched-seed discriminative pair. SURPRISE_GATE_ON (surprise gate active: unexpected harm spikes running_variance) vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED (gate disabled: no variance impulse on harm). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 6 pre-registered criteria: C1 ON delta_var_unexpected>=0.005 (both seeds), C2 ON delta_var_expected<0.002 (selective, both seeds), C3 ABLATED delta_var_unexpected<0.002 (baseline flat, both seeds), C4 (ON-ABLATED) discriminative_delta>=0.004 (both seeds), C5 n_unexpected_harm_ON>=10 (both seeds), C6 no fatal errors. spike_magnitude=0.05 surprise_threshold=0.02. Extends EXQ-064 PASS (single seed, 5/5) with matched-seed discriminative ablation design. Route-2 MECH-104 validation. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-030: REPLAY_ON vs REPLAY_ABLATED x 2 seeds (sleep consolidation discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0025 / EVB-0019: matched-seed discriminative pair. REPLAY_ON (online updates + post-episode batch consolidation: n_replay_steps=10, replay_batch=32) vs REPLAY_ABLATED (online updates only, no consolidation). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_replay_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0 (ablation learns something), C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests MECH-030 V3 proxy: does offline batch consolidation improve harm_eval_head quality beyond online-only training? Functional restatement of MECH-092 (offline batch consolidation during idle periods). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.35, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-103: FUSION_ON vs FUSION_ABLATED x 2 seeds (multimodal exteroceptive fusion discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0025 / EVB-0020: matched-seed discriminative pair. FUSION_ON (world_obs extended with informative auditory channel AUD_DIM=8: hazard-tone + resource-tone signals) vs FUSION_ABLATED (same architecture but zero-padded extra channel). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_fusion_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests MECH-103: does informative complementary modality improve z_world harm discrimination over single-modality? Same encoder architecture in both arms (extended world_obs_dim) isolates the modality information contribution. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: ARC-017: TYPED_TAGS_ON vs TYPED_TAGS_ABLATED x 2 seeds (sensory stream tag discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0026 / EVB-0021: matched-seed discriminative pair. TYPED_TAGS_ON (world_obs routed exclusively to z_world encoder; harm_obs routed separately via z_harm pathway -- ARC-017 typed stream separation) vs TYPED_TAGS_ABLATED (cat(world_obs, harm_obs) fed as single input to z_world encoder -- no typed routing). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_typed>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (TYPED-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests ARC-017: does typed stream separation (world vs harm channel routing) improve harm_eval_head quality vs untyped merged input? TYPED_TAGS_ABLATED merges harm_obs into world_obs before encoding -- the ablation destroys the WORLD/HARM stream type distinction. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-096: THREE_STREAM_ON vs THREE_STREAM_ABLATED x 2 seeds (dual-stream observation routing discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0028 / EVB-0024: matched-seed discriminative pair. THREE_STREAM_ON (dedicated dorsal/ventral/lateral encoder heads: body_obs -> z_self, world_obs -> z_world, harm_obs routed via SD-010 harm encoder -- MECH-096 dual-stream architecture) vs THREE_STREAM_ABLATED (single merged encoder: cat(world_obs, harm_obs, body_obs) -> z_merged serving as both z_world and z_harm -- no dedicated stream routing). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests MECH-096: does dedicated encoder head per stream (Goodale and Milner 1992 dorsal/ventral + Haak and Beckmann 2018 lateral stream) preserve z_self/z_world split and improve harm representation quality vs merged untyped encoder? Secondary diagnostic: cosine_sim(z_self, z_world) -- expected lower in THREE_STREAM_ON (cleaner split). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: ARC-023: MULTIRATE_ON vs MULTIRATE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (multi-rate heartbeat discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0033 / EVB-0025: matched-seed discriminative pair. MULTIRATE_ON (E3 updates only every 5 steps -- deliberation-rate separation, ARC-023 architecture; SD-006 phase 1 time-multiplexed proxy) vs MULTIRATE_ABLATED (E3 updates every step -- same rate as E1/E2, no rate separation). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests ARC-023 functional claim: rate-separated E3 (deliberation-rate loop) integrating z_world evidence over K-step chunks produces higher harm_eval signal-to-noise than same-rate E3. Secondary diagnostic: var_harm_eval -- lower variance in MULTIRATE_ON indicates more stable heartbeat integration. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9, e3_heartbeat_k=5.

items.title: MECH-070 E2 Motor-Model Discriminative Pair
items.note: EXP-0034 / EVB-0026: matched-seed discriminative pair. E2_MOTOR_ON (E2 trained as z_self forward model: 1-step MSE on z_self motor-sensory transitions, cerebellar analog) vs E2_MOTOR_ABLATED (E2 frozen at random init, motor model removed). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_motor_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 e2_r2_on>=0.05 (manipulation check: E2 learned a useful z_self model). Tests MECH-070 functional claim: E2 as a trained z_self motor forward model contributes to trajectory quality (harm_eval discrimination). E3 harm_eval trains normally in both conditions (trains on z_world). E1 trains normally in both conditions. Secondary diagnostic: e2_r2 (confirms manipulation integrity -- dry-run shows 0.83 vs 0.0 as expected). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-091: PHASE_RESET_ON vs PHASE_RESET_ABLATED x 2 seeds (salient-event E3 heartbeat phase-reset discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0035 / EVB-0027: matched-seed discriminative pair. PHASE_RESET_ON (on harm contact, E3 heartbeat_counter resets to 0 -- aligns next E3 update window with salient event, MECH-091 phase-reset architecture) vs PHASE_RESET_ABLATED (heartbeat_counter increments monotonically; salient events fall at arbitrary phase positions). Both conditions: E3_HEARTBEAT_K=5 (SD-006 phase 1 proxy, same as EXQ-131), same architecture. Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_reset_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 n_salient_resets>=10 (manipulation check: phase resets fired). Tests MECH-091 functional claim: cycle-boundary alignment on salient events improves harm_eval discrimination by ensuring harm estimates enter E3 at the start of a fresh cycle. nav_bias=0.50 (higher than EXQ-131 to ensure sufficient salient harm events for C5). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-103: FUSION_ON (somatosensory channel) vs FUSION_ABLATED x 2 seeds (multimodal exteroceptive fusion somatosensory replication pair)
items.note: Independent replication of EXQ-128 (auditory channel) using somatosensory modality (contact-force + near-surface vibration). Formal execution of EXP-0030/EVB-0022. Seeds [42,123]. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: ARC-017: REALITY_COHERENCE_ON vs REALITY_COHERENCE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (reality-coherence lane discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0031 / EVB-0023: matched-seed discriminative pair testing the reality-coherence lane facet of ARC-017. REALITY_COHERENCE_ON (world encoder trained exclusively on real env observations -- provenance preserved) vs REALITY_COHERENCE_ABLATED (world encoder also trained on noise-perturbed replay of past world_obs at noise_std=0.10, REPLAY_BATCH_PER_STEP=4 -- provenance constraint violated, real and imagined inputs treated equivalently). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 n_replay_contam_min>=50 (manipulation check). Evaluation uses real env observations only in both conditions; training is the only difference. Tests ARC-017 reality-coherence dimension: does keeping the world encoder anchored to real sensory provenance improve harm_eval discrimination vs an encoder contaminated by imagined/reconstructed inputs? Complementary to EXQ-129 (which tests stream-type routing dimension of ARC-017). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-092: QUIESCENT_REPLAY_ON vs QUIESCENT_REPLAY_ABLATED x 2 seeds (quiescent intra-episode replay discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0036 / EVB-0028: matched-seed discriminative pair. QUIESCENT_REPLAY_ON (online updates + quiescent intra-episode replay: fires N=8 consolidation steps after K=10 consecutive non-harm steps -- simulating MECH-092 quiescent E3 heartbeat window trigger) vs QUIESCENT_REPLAY_ABLATED (online updates only; quiescence counter runs but replay never fires). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_replay_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 n_quiescent_triggers_min>=15 (manipulation check: quiescent windows fired). Key distinction from EXQ-127 (MECH-030): EXQ-127 tests post-episode consolidation; EXQ-136 tests quiescent INTRA-EPISODE windows -- replay specifically triggered when K consecutive non-harm steps accumulate within an episode. Tests MECH-092 micro-quiescence mechanism: does consolidation triggered specifically during quiescent E3 heartbeat windows (no salient event) improve harm_eval discrimination beyond online-only updates? 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9, quiescence_k=10, n_replay_steps=8, replay_batch=16.

items.title: MECH-097: PPS_LOCUS_ON vs PPS_LOCUS_ABLATED x 2 seeds (peripersonal space commit locus discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0037 / EVB-0029: matched-seed discriminative pair. PPS_LOCUS_ON (harm_eval_head receives cat(z_world, pps_feature) where pps_feature = max hazard_field intensity in central 3x3 of 5x5 hazard_field_view -- encodes proximity to commit boundary) vs PPS_LOCUS_ABLATED (harm_eval_head receives z_world only, no PPS spatial signal). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_locus_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 n_approach_contacts_min>=10 (manipulation check: proximity events fired). Tests MECH-097 functional claim: does encoding PPS geometry (proximity to commit boundary) improve harm_eval discrimination beyond z_world-only baseline? PPS feature is the max hazard field intensity in the agent peripersonal neighbourhood -- the spatial envelope where z_self->z_world causal transitions occur. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.45, alpha_world=0.9. Both harm_eval_heads are standalone modules (HarmEvalHeadExtended) trained with separate optimizers.

items.title: ARC-030: GO_NOGO_SUPPORT vs NOGO_ONLY_ABLATED x 2 seeds (Go/NoGo symmetry discriminative pair, canonical matched seeds)
items.note: EXP-0061 / EVB-0053: canonical matched-seed discriminative pair for ARC-030 Go/NoGo symmetry. GO_NOGO_SUPPORT (full BG D1/D2 symmetry: harm_eval trained + z_goal attractor updated + benefit_eval trained + e1_goal_conditioned) vs NOGO_ONLY_ABLATED (pure NoGo: harm_eval only, z_goal/benefit_eval/e1_goal_cond all disabled). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 delta_benefit_rate>=0.002 (averaged seeds), C2 benefit_rate_go>=0.002 per seed (Go channel active), C3 harm_rate_go<=harm_rate_nogo*1.50 (harm avoidance maintained), C4 per-seed direction GO>NOGO (both seeds), C5 n_benefit_buf_go>=100 per seed (manipulation check: Go channel trained). Strengthens EXQ-086 (FAIL: warmup=150 too short, benefit_rate_go=0.0). Fixes: warmup 150->400, proximity_benefit_scale 0.05->0.10, num_resources 4->5, seeds [42,7]->[42,123]. Tests ARC-030 core prediction: pure NoGo produces behavioral flatness; full Go+NoGo symmetry breaks flatness and drives resource approach.

items.title: MECH-057a: COMPLETION_GATE_ON vs COMPLETION_GATE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (action loop completion gate discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0065 / EVB-0056: matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-057a. COMPLETION_GATE_ON (precision/running_variance updates suppressed during committed sequences, flushed as batch at completion boundary -- uncommitted transition; BetaGate active: elevated when committed, released at completion) vs COMPLETION_GATE_ABLATED (continuous per-step running_variance updates regardless of commitment state; BetaGate disabled). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_rate_on<=harm_rate_ablated*0.90 (10% relative reduction, both seeds), C2 per-seed absolute gap>=0.005 (both seeds), C3 n_harm_contact_min>=20 per cell, C4 n_committed_steps_min>=30 in eval (GATE_ON per seed, manipulation check: agent enters committed state), C5 no fatal errors. MECH-057a claim: committed sequences suppress precision updates until execution completes; completion events are principal policy-propagation opportunities (beta drops, E3 propagates). Distinct from EXQ-119 (MECH-090): that test measured beta gate CONCORDANCE with commitment; this test measures whether suppressing precision updates DURING commitment improves harm avoidance. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.45, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-094: TAG_GATE_ON vs TAG_GATE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (hypothesis tag write gate discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0070 / EVB-0060: matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-094. TAG_GATE_ON (hypothesis_tag=True blocks replay harm events from phi(z) write pathway -- only real harm events train harm_eval head) vs TAG_GATE_ABLATED (tag absent: replay harm accumulates alongside real harm in buffer -- PTSD contamination mechanism). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. N_REPLAY_PER_EP=2 replay episodes per real episode (offset-seed env + noise_std=0.10 to mark internally generated content). 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 contamination_gap_ON<=0.02 both seeds (tag suppresses replay routing; low spurious elevation), C2 contamination_gap_ABLATED>=0.04 both seeds (tag loss inflates harm_eval on replay content), C3 per-seed delta_contamination(ABLATED-ON)>=0.03 both seeds (discriminative gap), C4 real_harm_gap_ON>=0.03 both seeds (real harm still learned when tag active), C5 n_real_harm_min>=15 and n_replay_harm_min>=15 (data quality). Key diagnostic: replay_harm_buf_writes=0 in TAG_GATE_ON vs >0 in TAG_GATE_ABLATED (confirmed in dry-run). 400 warmup + 50 eval real eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.45, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-111: NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON vs NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (curiosity/novelty drive discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0072 / EVB-0061: matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-111. NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON (E1 prediction-error EMA feeds as exploration bonus to E3 trajectory scoring; novelty_bonus_weight=0.10 -- higher-E1-error trajectories preferred, curiosity-surprise drives approach toward novel states) vs NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED (novelty_bonus_weight=0.0; pure harm-avoidance baseline; drive absent). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 per-seed entropy_gap(ON-ABLATED)>=0.10 both seeds (novelty drive increases action diversity), C2 per-seed cell_gap(ON-ABLATED)>=3 both seeds (more unique cells visited), C3 per-seed harm_delta(ON-ABLATED)<=0.02 both seeds (curiosity-surprise is harm-safe; drive does not push into dangerous zones -- key MECH-111 prediction), C4 novelty_ema_ON>1e-6 both seeds (manipulation check: drive signal is non-zero), C5 n_harm_min>=10 both conditions both seeds (harm-avoidance context exists). Extends EXQ-073b (single-seed) to proper matched-seed discriminative pair. CausalGridWorld size=10, 5 hazards, 5 resources, nav_bias=0.30 (lower than harm-only exps to allow exploration). 200 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-113: SELF_MAINT_ON vs SELF_MAINT_ABLATED x 2 seeds (homeostatic z_self D_eff discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0074 / EVB-0062: matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-113. SELF_MAINT_ON (self_maintenance_weight=0.1, d_eff_target=1.5 -- homeostatic D_eff penalty penalises z_self dispersal above setpoint; reactive Level 1 allostatic self-efficacy, Stephan 2016) vs SELF_MAINT_ABLATED (self_maintenance_weight=0.0; no homeostatic signal; z_self learns only from E2 motor-sensory and E3 harm losses). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. Perturbation: Gaussian noise sigma=2.0 injected into z_self at start of post-training eval. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 ON d_eff_ratio(post/baseline)<=1.5x both seeds (homeostatic recovery), C2 ABLATED d_eff_ratio(post/baseline)>=2.0x both seeds (uncontrolled dispersal without homeostasis), C3 per-seed gap(ABLATED_post - ON_post)>=0.5x ABLATED_post both seeds (clear condition separation), C4 e2_loss_ON <= e2_loss_ABLATED+0.01 both seeds (homeostasis does not degrade E2 motor-sensory model), C5 n_d_eff_min>=50 per condition per seed (data quality). Extends EXQ-075d (single seed, no formal ablation pair) to canonical 2-seed discriminative design. CausalGridWorld size=10, 3 hazards, 5 resources, nav_bias=0.35. 200 warmup + 10 baseline + 30 post-perturb eval eps x 200 steps.
